parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Scope under which the request is made; determines fields present in response.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to be returned in result set.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Limit results to those matching a string.

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description: Ensure result set excludes specific IDs.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Limit result set to specific IDs.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset the result set by a specific number of items.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order sort attribute ascending or descending.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Limit result set to users with one or more specific slugs.

parameters.name: roles
parameters.description: Limit result set to users matching at least one specific role provided. Accepts csv list or single role.

email.description: The email address for the user.

slug.description: An alphanumeric identifier for the user.

parameters.description: Scope under which the request is made; determines fields present in response.

email.description: The email address for the user.

slug.description: An alphanumeric identifier for the user.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Required to be true, as users do not support trashing.

parameters.name: reassign
parameters.description: Reassign the deleted user's posts and links to this user ID.

timezone.description: A city in the same timezone as you.

date_format.description: A date format for all date strings.

time_format.description: A time format for all time strings.

start_of_week.description: A day number of the week that the week should start on.

use_smilies.description: Convert emoticons like :-) and :-P to graphics on display.

default_ping_status.description: Allow link notifications from other blogs (pingbacks and trackbacks) on new articles.

default_comment_status.description: Allow people to post comments on new articles.
